title: Chinese chef
what_we_expect: hand over the cooking space to the next shift
take care of the correct temperature of the kitchen appliances
work in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector
jobcontent:
A professional chef is needed to design traditional Chinese menus and prepare dishes for the restaurant's customers. This position requires a knack for designing menus for traditional Chinese dishes, at least 2 years of experience as a chef in a Chinese restaurant, passing the official Chinese chef qualification exam and a valid chef's certificate, a proactive work attitude and the ability to independently plan menus, prepare dishes and prepare food. In addition, this position requires diligence and the ability to perform physical work. We offer an international work environment, development opportunities and a permanent job

The turnover of the company Chen Ye Oy was 1.06 million and the profit for the financial year was 30 thousand. Turnover increased by 19.5%. The operating profit percentage was 3.9%. The information is based on the company's latest financial statements from 2024.

ajing.chen@hotmail.com

In addition, this position requires diligence and the ability to perform physical work. We offer an international work environment, development opportunities and a permanent job

The turnover of the company Chen Ye Oy was 1.06 million and the profit for the financial year was 30 thousand. Turnover increased by 19.5%. The operating profit percentage was 3.9%. The information is based on the company's latest financial statements from 2024.

title: Lärare inom småbarnspedagogik/ Steinerpedagog
jobapply_link: mailto:forestandare@nackrosen.fi?subject=Application for the Job - Lärare inom småbarnspedagogik/ Steinerpedagog
salary_range: Enligt kollektivavtal för privata socialservice G25 E + behörighetstillägg 160 €/mån, erfarenhetstillägg och mat förmån
what_we_expect: assists in the development of children's personal skills
take care of children's basic physical needs
jobcontent:
Vi söker en engagegarad Steinerpedagog/lärare som vill göra mielder i Barns vardag och utveckling.

Som läära inom småbarnspedagogik får du arbetra med mångsidiga och kreativa arbetstuften i en mångprofessionell arbetsgemenskap. You collaborate with your team and are responsible for planning, execution and development of pedagogic activities for children and age groups. Together, we create a secure, stimulating and creative environment that promotes children's learning, development and well-being.

Du stödjer Barnens sociala och emotionalella utveckling och aktivität aktiv i teamets arbete med uppföljning och planering av österningen. Verksamheten bygger på steinerpedagogik, med fokus på fri lek, rytm, skapande aktivitere, Barns njuvikhet samt firande av harststern och tradistella harststsfester.

Our business offers a safe, comfortable and pleasant day environment where children can grow and develop in age-mixed groups. The age-blended business creates natural opportunities for children and young adults to learn and play.
Vi arbeter enligt Steinerpedagogik, som betonar barnets naturgali njuvikhet, kreativität och oppäskarglädje. Genom fri lek, skapande activitet och en rytmisk vardag strævar vi efter att ge varje barn motsätigät att utvlaklas i sin egen takt.

For more information, you are welcome to contact manager Maria Stenius at 050-3096786 or via E-mail: forestandare@nackrosen.fi. Send your application and CV to the same E-mail or to Steinerlekskolan Näckrosen rf, Resovägen 10, 00280 Helsingfors.

title: Barber
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: preparations intended for hair and facial hair
stay up to date with hair fashion
jobcontent:
We are looking for a competent and professional barber, the job also includes customer service.

You should have at least 5 years of work experience.

As a barber, you are expected to have good skills and customer service.

The duration of the work is 5 days a week, and 8 hours a day,

salary is negotiable, but at least €2000 per month.

If you are the barber I am looking for, feel free to contact my email.

the best way to reach me is via email: aliaqol@yahoo.com / eleganceparturi@gmail.com

Elegance Barbershop

Contact on weekdays to my email

aliaqol@yahoo.com

eleganceparturi@gmail.com

you can put your cv in my e-mail.

title: Licensed caregiver for a private home care company
what_we_expect: support users of social services in living at home
follow precautions that promote health and safety in social welfare activities
to assess the elderly's ability to take care of themselves
assists in administering medications to the elderly
jobcontent:
Rosahoiva Oy is looking for a licensed home care worker for home care tasks in the capital region. The employment relationship is fixed-term for 1 year and includes a 6-month trial period.

The work is mobile home care work and requires flexibility, as schedules and work order can change at short notice. The work is done in customers' homes and requires an independent approach, responsibility and good communication skills.

The work starts as soon as a suitable nurse is found. Success in the task requires a genuine interest and motivation to work with the elderly. We value an empathetic approach to work, the ability to meet customers individually, and the desire to support their well-being and functioning in a respectful and professional manner.

**Working hours**

\* As a rule, mape at 7.3015.30

\* The work may include evening shifts

\* Currently no weekend work

\* Any weekend work is voluntary

**Assignment picture**

\* Basic care and nursing work in home care for the elderly

\* Implementation of medical treatment in accordance with valid permits

\* Documentation of customer work (reports, evaluations and treatment plans)

\* Monitoring and evaluation of customers' performance

\* Cooperation with the rest of the treatment team

**We are looking for a nurse who has**

\* Nursing degree

\* Valid medical licenses

\* Experience or desire to learn about home-based services for the elderly, as well as the ability to deal with different customer situations empathetically and professionally

\* Self-directedness and courage to act in changing situations

\* Good knowledge of the Finnish language (at least B2); the work includes written documentation

\* \* Driver's license and the ability to use your own car (necessary for getting around at work)

\* Criminal record extract

**Salary**

Salary is determined in accordance with the collective agreement in the private social service sector (SOSTES). The minimum salary for the role of a caregiver is approximately €2,300/month (full-time), and the salary is determined based on education, work experience and skills. In addition, evening and other possible supplements according to TES are paid.

**About us**

Rosahoiva Oy is a small, private home care company in Myyrmäki, Vantaa. Our operations are based on personal customer work, trust and genuine knowledge of our employees. With us, you are not just a name on the list, but part of a small and functional work community.

We currently do not offer extensive company benefits, but as a counterweight we offer a low hierarchy, direct contact with a superior, and the opportunity to influence one's own work. Our goal is to grow in a controlled and long-term way, and we are looking for an employee who wants to be involved in developing the company and its operations.

The operating concept of Rosa hoivapalvelut Oy's home service is to provide high-quality and customer-oriented home medical care, home care and support services for elderly and disabled customers whose functional capacity or health status has decreased. The goal is to enable and secure services for the customer in their home. The values ​​that guide the operation are customer orientation, individuality, continuity, cooperation, openness, appreciation, responsibility and professionalism.

title: Helpers in actual Finland
what_we_expect: to provide home services for the disabled
support users of social services in living at home
what_we_offer: Hourly wage €12.8914.18 + 9% holiday allowance + evening and weekend supplements according to TES. Wages according to experience: 0 years = €12.89, 5 years = €13.30, 8 years = €13.75, 11 years = €14.18/h
In the job of a nurse, the salary is €15-16 + 9% holiday allowance + evening and weekend allowances according to TES.
The opportunity to focus on work in an unhurried atmosphere
We are a domestic company specializing in personal assistance and take-home services.
\-Impeccable background and criminal record are always checked before starting the employment relationship.
\-Work experience is not necessary, but it is considered an advantage
jobcontent:
WE ARE LOOKING FOR PERSONAL ASSISTANTS AND NURSES

We are looking for personal assistants and caregivers for disability services for gig work.

As an assistant, you enable your client's everyday life. The purpose of your work is to support the customer to live a life of his own, the kind that he himself wants to live, but in which he needs help due to illness or disability. You assist the customer in a wide variety of daily situations, such as outdoor activities, and make everyday life smoother and more pleasant.

We are looking for self-starting assistants with good communication skills and experience working as a personal assistant. The most important thing at work is the right attitude and the desire to help. A cheerful, empathetic and reliable attitude goes a long way!

When applying, please indicate in which area you could work, what kind of work experience you have and your language skills. Some of the customers speak foreign languages, so language skills for them are considered an advantage.

We offer flexible work that you can adapt to your own life situation.

We offer you:

Hourly wage €12.8914.18 + 9% holiday allowance + evening and weekend supplements according to TES. Wages according to experience: 0 years = €12.89, 5 years = €13.30, 8 years = €13.75, 11 years = €14.18/h

In the job of a nurse, the salary is €15-16 + 9% holiday allowance + evening and weekend allowances according to TES.

Comfortable and flexible work

The opportunity to focus on work in an unhurried atmosphere

We are a domestic company specializing in personal assistance and take-home services.

Apply easily and quickly at: benehoiva.fi

We require:

\-Impeccable background and criminal record are always checked before starting the employment relationship.

\-Work experience is not necessary, but it is considered an advantage

We are a growing domestic company specializing in non-urgent home services. We invest in quality in all our activities and we want both employees and customers to be met.

You can also leave us your contact information via the website www.benehoiva.fi
